dag.description: XGBoost training pipeline with feature selection and model calibration

metadata.name: xgboost_training_with_calibration_fs
metadata.description: XGBoost training pipeline with feature selection and model calibration

agent_context.when_to_use: When you need both feature selection (to reduce dimensionality/remove noisy features) AND calibrated scores, but don't need full e2e registration. Useful for models with many candidate features where automatic pruning improves generalization.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: If you don't need feature selection (use training_with_calibration). If you need full e2e with registration (use complete_e2e). If you need preprocessing like missing value imputation (use training_with_feature_selection which includes MVI+risk tables).
differentiators: Combines FeatureSelection + Calibration in one DAG
Feature selection applied to both training and calibration branches
No missing value imputation or risk table mapping (unlike training_with_feature_selection)

prerequisites.check: Large feature set that needs pruning
prerequisites.how: More than 50 candidate features where many may be irrelevant
Cradle SQL for calibration data from different time period

common_pitfalls: Feature selection threshold too aggressive can remove useful features
Feature selection model uses same training data - ensure calibration data uses selected features
